text:
Created attachment 190371
Update cacti to 1.1.34

Update cacti to 1.1.34

This is a bugfix release, no merge-quarterly required.
Committer: please ignore any portlint warnings regarding gettext, cacti has internal gettext support.

Poudriere testport logs for 10.4/11.1 i386/amd64 located at:

https://poudriere.dan.tm/poudriere/data/latest-per-pkg/cacti/1.1.34/
